name: Changelog Reminder
description: After a spec task completes, remind the agent to add a CHANGELOG entry for the change

then.prompt: A task just completed. Check if a CHANGELOG.md exists in the project. If it does, add an entry under the appropriate section (Added, Changed, Fixed, or Removed) describing what was done in this task. Use the format: '- Brief description of the change'. If no CHANGELOG.md exists, skip this step.
